summary: Verified all 6 quality stabilization steps for ERP codebase: atomic counters, MongoDB serializer, indexes, pagination, global search, and morning briefing

STEP1_atomic_counter_preventivi.details: All 3 paths (POST /api/preventivi/, POST /api/preventivi/from-distinta/{id}, POST /api/preventivi/{id}/clone) use find_one_and_update with max_existing sync logic

STEP2_serializer_mongodb.details: /app/backend/core/serializer.py exists with serialize_doc and serialize_list functions. get_commessa_or_404 uses projection _id:0

STEP3_mongodb_indexes.details: Index script verified with all 8 required collections: commesse, preventivi, fatture_ricevute, invoices, movimenti_bancari, clients, ddt_documents, material_batches

STEP4_pagination.details: All 3 endpoints return correct pagination structure

endpoints_tested.GET /api/commesse/?page=1&per_page=2: returns page, per_page, pages, total, items (6 total items, 3 pages)
endpoints_tested.GET /api/preventivi/?page=1&per_page=3: returns page, per_page, pages, total, preventivi (45 total, 15 pages)
endpoints_tested.GET /api/ddt/?page=1&per_page=3: returns page, per_page, pages, total, items (2 total, 1 page)

STEP5_global_search.details: GET /api/search/?q=NF returns results array with type, id, label, subtitle, url fields

STEP6_morning_briefing.details: GET /api/dashboard/morning-briefing returns scadenze_oggi_domani, pagamenti_ritardo, commesse_allarme, da_fare

seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test user session
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 quality steps verified. Codebase is stable. Test user has 6 commesse, 45 preventivi (after test creation), 2 DDT, and various fatture. Pagination backward compatibility maintained (commesse returns 'items', preventivi returns 'preventivi', ddt returns 'items').
